hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); worktree=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo '=== Frank Session ==='; echo "Branch:   $branch"; echo "Worktree: $worktree"; if [ "$branch" = "master" ] || [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo ''; echo 'WARNING: On master branch. Edits will be blocked.'; echo 'Create a worktree first:'; echo '  git worktree add .worktrees/<name> -b <branch>'; fi

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); file="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$file" in "$repo_root"/*) if [ "$branch" = "master" ] || [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot edit files on master. Create a worktree first:" >&2; echo "  git worktree add .worktrees/<name> -b <branch>" >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac
file="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.fs$'; then dotnet fantomas "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); fs_changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(fs|fsi|fsx|fsproj|sln)$" | head -1); echo '=== Verification Sequence ==='; if [ -n "$fs_changed" ] && [ "$branch" != "master" ] && [ "$branch" != "main" ]; then echo "!! Uncommitted F# changes on $branch - run build BEFORE claiming complete:"; echo "!! DOTNET_SYSTEM_GLOBALIZATION_INVARIANT=1 dotnet build Frank.sln"; echo ""; fi; echo 'Before claiming work is complete:'; echo '1. dotnet build Frank.sln'; echo '2. dotnet test Frank.sln --filter FullyQualifiedName!~Sample'; echo '3. dotnet test test/Frank.Tests/'; echo '4. find sample/ -name test-e2e.sh -exec echo Run: {} \;'; echo '5. /verification-before-completion'; echo '6. /simplify'; echo '7. /expert-review'; echo 'Address all findings before opening a PR.'

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); worktree=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo '=== Context Compacted ==='; echo "Branch: $branch | Worktree: $worktree"; echo 'CONSTITUTION: Resource-oriented design. CE is the API. Library not framework. No silent exception swallowing. use bindings for IDisposable. No duplicated logic.'; echo 'WORKFLOW: Work on worktrees only. Run full verification sequence before PRs.'
